name: Cream Cheese Chocolate Chip Pizza (Soft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly grease two 12-inch pizza pans.
3. Cream butter, sugars, cream cheese, and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Add eggs; beat until light and combined.
5. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
7. Stir in chocolate chips and walnuts (if using).
8. Divide dough into two portions and spread evenly into prepared pans.
9. IMPORTANT - DO NOT SPREAD ALL THE WAY TO EDGES, LEAVE ABOUT A HALF INCH SPACE BETWEEN EDGE OF DOUGH AND RIM OF PAN.
10. Bake 20 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Cool completely in pans on wire racks.
12. To serve: cut into slim wedges.
